About the job

Lead / Founding Engineer (Stealth Consumer Startup)


We’re currently partnered with a stealth, early-stage consumer startup building a new interactive web platform.


They’re looking for a Lead / Founding Engineer to join at an early stage and take ownership of building the product from the ground up.


This is a hands-on role suited to someone who enjoys working from 0 → 1 and wants to play a key role in shaping both product and technical direction.


What you’ll be doing

  • Building and shipping the core product across the full stack
  • Turning an early prototype into a scalable, production-ready platform
  • Working closely with the founder on product decisions and UX
  • Designing and implementing core backend systems and user-facing features
  • Integrating third-party services and lightweight AI functionality where relevant


What they’re looking for

  • Strong full-stack engineering experience (modern JS frameworks, APIs, databases)
  • Comfortable owning the entire stack end-to-end
  • Product mindset — able to think beyond just implementation
  • Experience building and shipping real products
  • Self-starter who thrives in early-stage, ambiguous environments


Nice to have

  • Experience with consumer-facing products
  • Experience building interactive or data-driven platforms
  • Familiarity with AI APIs and integrations


Why this role

  • Opportunity to join at a very early stage as a key technical hire
  • High ownership and direct impact on product direction
  • Small, fast-moving team
  • Clear pathway to evolve into a long-term founding role with meaningful equity


Further details on application.
